title: United States hog inventory down 2%
summary: As of Dec. 1, there were 73.1 million hogs and pigs on U.S. farms, down 2% from December 2021 and down 1% from Sept. 1, 2022, according to the Quarterly Hogs and Pigs report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: December 22, 2022
summary: December 22, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a lower rate from last week, of 2.95% , from the level on 12/15/2022 of 12.187 M km 2 to 12.558 M km 2 for this week. title: Notice of BSNC Board Vacancy/Solicitation of Letters of Interest
summary: BSNC seeks shareholders interested in filling a vacant seat on the BSNC Board of Directors. In accordance with the corporate bylaws, the individual appointed to fill the vacancy will serve until the Annual Meeting of Shareholders in 2024.
